description: A customer calls to dispute an invoice, claiming they were billed for services they did not receive.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the disputed invoice and any related documents, like the original sales order or statement of work.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the invoice and the signed statement of work.

nodes.task_description: Review the documents to validate the charges against the agreed-upon services.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the services on the invoice match the statement of work.

nodes.task_description: Place the invoice in 'dispute' status to pause collections activity while it's being investigated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully flags the invoice as disputed.

nodes.task_description: Communicate with the sales representative or account manager to gather more information and resolve the dispute with the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a notification to the account manager to contact the customer and clarify the services rendered.
